headerDisplay: Sign in to your Kwikset account using the **Settings** UI above. Your password is used once to obtain a token and is never stored.
footerDisplay: This plugin uses Kwikset's unofficial cloud API and may break if Kwikset changes it.

email.title: Account Email
email.description: Set automatically when you sign in via the custom UI.

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Set automatically when you sign in. Treat as a secret.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh lock state from the cloud.

lowBatteryThreshold.title: Low Battery Threshold (%)
lowBatteryThreshold.description: Report low battery at or below this level.
